series_metadata.series_title: Internal Revenue Service And State of Ohio Completed Tax Form Files
series_metadata.series_description: File contains various notices from the Internal Revenue Service. The notices generally pertain to but are not limited to Lottery Agent and/or prizewinner tax identification numbers variances, withholding tax differences and proposed penalty assessments. This file is maintained in date order within calendar year

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain digital and any hard copies in operating area for seven (7) years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain digital and any hard copies in operating area for seven (7) years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
